rows.label: tev071301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Kon'luarb about Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Kon'luarb about the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Kon'luarb about the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Kon'luarb about Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL2021
rows.name:
Ask Kon'luarb if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Kon'luarb about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_SEL3031
rows.name:
Ask Kon'luarb what he
intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0001
rows.name:
You've transferred your consciousnesses
from your real bodies to reproductions
that are surely bereft of Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0002
rows.name:
That sounds like the action
of a deranged person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0003
rows.name:
But there is perhaps something we can learn
from the intense desire to persevere that
drives you to take such extraordinary measures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0004
rows.name:
After all, if my people wish to survive
on this planet, we're going to need to
display some humanlike tenacity ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0030
rows.name:
The Growth seemed to be in quite a panic
over their failure to eradicate you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0031
rows.name:
After that, they ordered us to
immediately begin developing a
new weapon to destroy humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0032
rows.name:
It is a good thing that we were
able to defect to NLA before
we were forced to comply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Now we will devote ourselves to developing anti-
Growth weaponry. I hope that you'll use their
power to wipe that group off this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0038
rows.name:
I must admit that I have underestimated
your people's strength and tenacity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0039
rows.name:
I am truly impressed that you
were able to weather such a
fierce offensive from the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Clearly we made the right choice in
seeking sanctuary with humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0041
rows.name:
I hope that you will be able to continue
resisting them, as well as protecting us
with those mechanical bodies of yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0046
rows.name:
Your artificial bodies seem to have a number
of functions—such as emotional expression—that
have no utility in combat situations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0047
rows.name:
If you would allow us, we could
streamline your Blue Bloods by
removing these unnecessary functions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0048
rows.name:
May we modify you into
remorseless killing machines?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0049
rows.name:
...This does not interest you in the least?
Fascinating. Why would you abandon your bodies
and yet adhere to such needlessly cosmetic features?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0050
rows.name: Yours are a people of many mysteries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Having lost our senirapa water, we
Orphe are no longer capable of reproducing
through Union as we always have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0015
rows.name:
We must begin searching for a new
source of senirapa water soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0016
rows.name:
However, the wilds of Mira are quite perilous.
I calculate a 93.5 percent chance that the
search team would be wiped out in the process.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0017
rows.name:
We must gather more information
from which to derive an answer
on how best to proceed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0018
rows.name:
What do you think? Have you noticed that
you're seeing more Orphe in NLA lately?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0019
rows.name:
This would not have been possible without you. We
took the senirapa water you brought us and began
mass-producing it at the water-purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0020
rows.name:
As you can see, we were able to successfully
produce multiple new individuals![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thank you. I will make sure that my gratitude
towards you is passed, along with this body's
Ovah, to my countless future offspring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0055
rows.name:
I would like to keep reproducing until
we Orphe return to our former population
level of roughly 20 billion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0056
rows.name:
At that population level, we could endure
even large amounts of predation from
indigens without fear of extinction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0057
rows.name:
Although I suppose that would cause a host of new
problems—such as finding acceptable habitats in which
to live and securing a sufficient supply of plants to eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0058
rows.name:
But I am confident that by maintaining
a strong alliance with your people,
we could overcome such obstacles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG0059
rows.name:
I hope that our people can continue
working together to ensure our
mutual survival here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG4001
rows.name:
Recently, red Orphe betaforms
have been produced due to some
sort of spontaneous mutation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG4002
rows.name:
I am responsible for overseeing the
production of the senirapa water.
Could this have been the cause?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG4003
rows.name:
I have been investigating the matter, but
I have yet to find any abnormalities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG4004
rows.name:
I don't understand it. Until now, we've
been able to consistently reproduce with
minimal amounts of individual variation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071301_MSG4005
rows.name: What could be happening to us?[ST:wait ]
